caption: A man with a dark beard, wearing a grey button-down shirt and a lapel microphone, speaks directly to the camera against a dark blue background featuring repeating grey text that reads "DAILY ROUND-UP". The "peoples dispatch" logo is visible in the top left corner of each scene. As the video progresses, different white text overlays appear beside him. Initially, a box lists "7.6 Million Infections", "3.3 Million Active Cases", and "424,000 Fatalities" above the header "COVID - 19 UPDATES". The overlay then changes to show "300,000 Reported Cases", "30,000 New Cases", and "1,000 Fatalities every day" under the truncated text "VID - 19". Later, the text shifts to state, "The total number of cases is expected to cross the 300,000 mark over the weekend", accompanied by the fragmented text "D - 19". Finally, the on-screen text overlays disappear entirely as the man continues speaking.
